response: This is the classic bottom-up 2D dynamic programming implementation of the **0-1 Knapsack algorithm**, which calculates the maximum total value obtainable by selecting items (each item may be taken at most once) without exceeding the given bag weight capacity. It iteratively builds a solution table tracking the best possible value for every combination of the first `i` items and every possible weight limit, at each step choosing whether including the current item produces a better result than skipping it entirely.
